name: Isolation Movement
description:
Unlocks Temporal Isolation when equipped to your Chronotector. 
[Isolation]: Temporarily relocates the caster and party members to an alternate space-time.

name: Reversal Movement
description:
Unlocks Time Reversal when equipped to your Chronotector.
[Reversal]: Records the current space-time. Reactivating this ability reverts the caster to their previous state.

name: Resistance Movement
description:
Unlocks Temporal Resistance when equipped to your Chronotector.
[Resistance]: Reduces the caster's falling speed.

name: Specter Summon Movement
description:
Unlocks Specter Summon when equipped to your Chronotector.
[Summon]: Temporarily summons a Void Apostle.

name: Tuning Movement
description:
Unlocks Temporal Tuning when equipped to your Chronotector.
[Tuning]: Manipulates time to reveal traces of space-time.
